item.title: 国家超算互联网免费送 3000 万词元
item.guid: 国家超算互联网免费送-3000-万词元
item.description:
Yesterday, the National Supercomputing Internet announced the launch of a new round of token giveaway activities, with individuals eligible to receive up to 30 million tokens for free. This event aims to lower the barrier to entry for products such as the research-exclusive intelligent agent "SClaw", with the redemption rules as follows: 昨天，国家超算互联网宣布启动新一轮词元（Token）赠送活动，单人最高可免费领取 3000 万词元额度。本次活动旨在降低科研专属智能体「龙虾」SClaw 等产品的使用门槛，领取规则如下：

    New users who register and log in to the Supercomputing Internet will receive 10 million Tokens;

    Deploy OpenClaw with one click on the Supercomputing Internet to receive an additional 10 million "Shrimp Farming" exclusive Tokens (for existing users who participated in the previous event, the trial period will be uniformly extended to April 6th);

    Participate in the functional test experience of the supercomputing internet client SClaw, and you can additionally receive 10 million "Shrimp Farming" exclusive Tokens.

In addition, the special renewal price of 0.1 yuan / million Tokens previously enjoyed by supercomputing internet users has its validity period simultaneously extended to April 6. 此外，超算互联网用户此前享有的 0.1 元 / 百万 Tokens 特惠续用价，有效期同步延长至 4 月 6 日。

item.title: SpaceX 最快本周提交 IPO，目标募资超 750 亿美元
item.guid: SpaceX-最快本周提交-IPO，目标募资超-750-亿美元
item.description:
According to The Information, SpaceX plans to submit its IPO prospectus to regulators as early as this week, aiming to complete its listing in June this year. According to Renaissance Capital data, if this fundraising scale materializes, it will exceed the total amount raised by all IPOs in the United States last year. 据 The Information 报道，SpaceX 计划最快于本周向监管机构提交 IPO 招股说明书，目标在今年 6 月完成上市。据文艺复兴资本数据，此次募资规模若成真，将超过去年美国所有 IPO 的募资总和。

Advisors involved in the preparation expect SpaceX's IPO fundraising scale to potentially exceed $75 billion, higher than the previously estimated $50 billion. The company is currently valued at $1.25 trillion, but the final fundraising scale and pricing will only be determined weeks before the IPO. 参与筹备的顾问预计，SpaceX 此次 IPO 募资规模可能超过 750 亿美元，高于此前外界估计的 500 亿美元。公司目前估值为 1.25 万亿美元，但最终募资规模和定价将在 IPO 前数周才会确定。

Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Bank of America, JPMorgan Chase, and Citi have been fully involved in the IPO preparation work, although they have not yet been formally appointed. According to previous reports from The Information, SpaceX has discussed a division of labor model with various investment banks, with different banks responsible for different task segments. 高盛、摩根士丹利、美国银行、摩根大通和花旗已全程参与 IPO 筹备工作，尽管尚未正式获得委任。据 The Information 此前报道，SpaceX 已与各投行讨论分工模式，由不同银行负责不同任务板块。

item.title: 曝苹果将推 Siri 独立 App 对标 ChatGPT
item.guid: 曝苹果将推-Siri-独立-App-对标-ChatGPT
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, the brand new Siri, codenamed "Campo," is expected to officially debut at WWDC26 on June 9th, alongside iOS 27 and macOS 27, marking Siri's largest-scale reconstruction since its inception. 据彭博社报道，代号「Campo」的全新 Siri 预计将在 6 月 9 日的 WWDC26 上随 iOS 27 和 macOS 27 正式亮相，这是 Siri 自面世以来最大规模的重构。

The report points out that the reconstructed Siri will function as a standalone app, allowing users to directly open and converse with Siri, with a UI similar to iMessage. The main interface will display historical conversations in a list or rounded rectangular grid, allowing users to pin frequently used conversations and search historical records. 报道指出，重构后的 Siri 将作为单独的 App，用户可直接打开与 Siri 对话，UI 与 iMessage 类似。主界面以列表或圆角矩形网格呈现历史对话，可置顶常用会话、搜索历史记录。

The conversation interface adopts a bubble-style layout, supporting free switching between text and voice modes, and also supports uploading documents and images for analysis. When initiating a new conversation, Siri will also recommend prompt words based on usage habits. 对话界面则采用气泡式布局，支持文字与语音模式自由切换，也支持上传文档和图片进行分析。发起新对话时，Siri 还会根据使用习惯推荐提示词。

At the system level, Apple is testing replacing Spotlight with Siri as the unified system search entry point. Once activated, Siri will pop up from the Dynamic Island, prompting users to "search or ask a question." 在系统层面，苹果正在测试以 Siri 取代 Spotlight，成为统一的系统搜索入口。激活后，Siri 将从灵动岛弹出，提示用户「搜索或提问」。

The new Siri will also provide richer web summary answers, including summaries, key points, and images, and can generate daily news summaries through Apple News content, competing with AI search tools like Google Gemini and Perplexity. 新版 Siri 还将提供更丰富的网页摘要回答，包含摘要、要点和图片，并可通过 Apple News 内容生成每日新闻摘要，与 Google Gemini、Perplexity 等 AI 搜索工具展开竞争。

Meanwhile, Apple is also testing two new system-level entry points: a "Talk to Siri" option will be added to the long-press menu, allowing users to directly send selected content to Siri to start a conversation; a "Siri Write Assist" button will be added to the top of the keyboard. 与此同时，苹果还在测试两个新的系统级入口：长按呼出菜单中将新增「与 Siri 对话」选项，用户可将选中内容直接发送至 Siri 展开对话；键盘顶部则将新增「Siri 帮写」按钮。

🔗 Related Reading: Just now, Apple's ChatGPT was exposed, and AI Siri will take over everything on your iPhone 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，苹果版 ChatGPT 曝光，AI Siri 将接管你 iPhone 上的一切

item.title: MIUI 正式停更，最后两款设备停止支持
item.guid: MIUI-正式停更，最后两款设备停止支持
item.description:
According to Gizmochina, yesterday, Xiaomi officially terminated update support for all devices running MIUI system, marking the end of this 15-year-old custom UI. 据 Gizmochina 报道，昨日，小米正式终止了所有搭载 MIUI 系统设备的更新支持，这款运行长达 15 年的定制 UI 就此谢幕。

The last devices to stop receiving support are Redmi A2 and Redmi A2+. Both models received Android 13 as their final major version upgrade, completed their last version update in December 2024 (firmware version V14.0.44.0.TGOMIXM), and security updates officially ceased yesterday. 最后停止支持的设备是 Redmi A2 和 Redmi A2+。两款机型均以 Android 13 作为最终大版本升级，于 2024 年 12 月完成最后一次版本更新（固件版本号 V14.0.44.0.TGOMIXM），昨天起安全更新也已正式终止。

item.title: 智谱多模态大模型「上车」迈巴赫
item.guid: 智谱多模态大模型「上车」迈巴赫
item.description:
Yesterday, Mercedes-Benz officially announced that the edge-side multimodal large model technology developed in collaboration with Tsinghua University and Zhipu will be implemented in the new generation S-Class sedan. 昨天，梅赛德斯-奔驰官宣，与清华大学、智谱合作开发的端侧多模态大模型技术将落地新一代 S 级轿车。

The new Mercedes-Maybach S-Class sedan will be the first to feature this technology. Its rear-seat entertainment system will deeply integrate natural language processing with multimodal understanding and generation capabilities for vision and audio, combined with in-car cameras and other sensing hardware, to bring a more intelligent and humanized immersive interactive experience to rear-seat passengers. 新款梅赛德斯-迈巴赫 S 级轿车将率先搭载该技术，其后排娱乐系统将深度融合自然语言处理与视觉、音频等多模态理解及生成能力，并结合车内摄像头等感知硬件，为后排乘客带来更智能、更人性化的沉浸式交互体验。

🔗 Related Reading: Comprehensive intelligent upgrade! The new generation Maybach S-Class debuts, along with a brand new MPV 🔗 相关阅读： 智能化全面升级！新一代迈巴赫 S 级亮相，还有一台全新 MPV

item.title: Epic Games 宣布裁员逾千人
item.guid: Epic-Games-宣布裁员逾千人
item.description:
Epic Games recently announced it would lay off over 1,000 people, directly due to a continuous decline in user engagement for "Fortnite" since 2025, leading to company expenses far exceeding revenue. Epic Games 近日宣布将裁员超 1000 人，直接原因是《堡垒之夜》自 2025 年起用户参与度持续下滑，导致公司支出远超收入。

After the layoffs, Epic still has over 4,000 employees. Affected employees will receive severance compensation of at least four months of basic salary, with the specific amount depending on their length of service. 裁员后，Epic 仍有超 4000 名员工。受影响员工将获得至少四个月基本薪资的遣散补偿，具体金额视工龄而定。

In an open letter, CEO Tim Sweeney divided the challenges into two categories: industry common issues and Epic's own issues: CEO Tim Sweeney 在公开信中将此次挑战分为行业共性问题与 Epic 自身问题两类：

    At the industry level, growth is slowing, consumption is weak, current-generation console sales are lower than the previous generation, and games must compete with other forms of entertainment for user time;

    At Epic's own level, although "Fortnite" remains one of the most successful games globally, the company faces difficulties in "continuously creating 'Fortnite-style miracles' every season"; the work of returning to mobile and optimizing "Fortnite" for billions of smartphones worldwide is still in its early stages.

Regarding external concerns about AI replacing developers, Sweeney explicitly stated in an open letter: "These layoffs have nothing to do with AI." He emphasized that as long as AI can improve productivity, the company wants to have as many excellent developers as possible. 针对外界对 AI 取代开发者的担忧，Sweeney 在公开信中明确表示： 「此次裁员与 AI 无关。」 他强调，只要 AI 能够提升生产效率，公司希望拥有尽可能多的优秀开发者。

item.title: 快手 2025 年财报：日活破 4 亿，AI 单月收入破 2000 万美元
item.guid: 快手-2025-年财报：日活破-4-亿，AI-单月收入破-2000-万美元
item.description:
Kuaishou Technology disclosed its full-year 2025 performance yesterday, overall: 快手科技昨日披露 2025 年全年业绩，总体来看：

    Full-year revenue was 142.776 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 12.5%; adjusted net profit was 20.647 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 16.5%;

    Full-year daily active users reached 410.2 million, and monthly active users reached 724.6 million; average daily usage time in the fourth quarter was 126 minutes;

    Full-year GMV (Gross Merchandise Volume) was approximately 1.6 trillion yuan, with a year-on-year increase of 12.9% to 521.8 billion yuan in the fourth quarter.

Keling AI's fourth-quarter revenue reached 340 million yuan, with single-month revenue exceeding 20 million USD in December last year, and an annualized revenue run rate (ARR) of 240 million USD. 可灵 AI 第四季度营收达 3.4 亿元，去年 12 月单月收入突破 2000 万美元，年化收入运行率（ARR）达 2.4 亿美元。

In terms of R&D investment, full-year R&D expenditure last year increased by 18.8% year-on-year to 14.491 billion yuan, while the proportion of sales and marketing expenses to revenue decreased from 32.4% to 29.6%, indicating continuous improvement in earnings quality. 研发投入方面，去年全年研发开支同比增长 18.8% 至 144.91 亿元，销售及营销开支占收入比例则从 32.4% 降至 29.6%，盈利质量持续改善。

item.title: Cloudflare 选择 Kimi K2.5 替代闭源模型，推理成本直降 77%
item.guid: Cloudflare-选择-Kimi-K2.5-替代闭源模型，推理成本直降-77%
item.description:
Yesterday, Kimi Open Platform announced that Cloudflare recently disclosed that it has integrated Kimi K2.5 into its core production business, achieving a 77% reduction in inference costs. 昨天，Kimi 开放平台宣布，Cloudflare 近日披露，该公司已将 Kimi K2.5 引入核心生产业务，并实现了 77% 的推理成本降幅。

Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince stated at this year's SXSW 2026 conference that future internet traffic will be driven by hundreds of millions of AI agents, and inference demand will grow exponentially. Facing this trend, Cloudflare has decided to no longer rely on closed-source models in its actual business. Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince 在今年的 SXSW 2026 大会上表示，未来互联网流量将由数以亿计的 AI 智能体驱动，推理需求将呈指数级增长。面对这一趋势，Cloudflare 已决定在实际业务中不再依赖闭源模型。

During the evaluation process, Kimi K2.5 stood out with its 256k context window, visual input capability, and stable logical reasoning ability. It also supports complex multi-turn tool calls and structured output, performing exceptionally well in programming and Agent tasks. 在评估过程中，Kimi K2.5 凭借 256k 上下文窗口、视觉输入能力和稳定的逻辑推理能力脱颖而出，同时支持复杂的多轮工具调用与结构化输出，在编程和 Agent 任务中表现突出。

item.title: 脑机接口企业傲意科技获 1.5 亿融资
item.guid: 脑机接口企业傲意科技获-1.5-亿融资
item.description:
Yesterday, Aoyee Technology announced the completion of its C1 round of financing, raising 150 million RMB. This round was led by Shenzhen Brain Science and Brain-Inspired Intelligence Industry Investment Fund (CICC Brain Science Fund) under CICC Capital, with continuous follow-on investments from several existing shareholders. 昨天，傲意科技昨日宣布完成 C1 轮融资，融资金额为 1.5 亿元人民币。本轮由中金资本旗下深圳市脑科学与类脑智能产业投资基金（中金脑科学基金）领投，多家老股东持续跟投。

According to official information, Shanghai Aoyee Information Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in non-invasive neural signal sensing and AI analysis technology. It is one of the earliest technology enterprises in China to achieve large-scale commercial application of brain-computer interface technology, and also the first domestic brain-computer interface enterprise to build a "brain (EEG) - muscle (EMG) - machine (ROBAT)" trinity technical system. 据官方资料，上海傲意信息科技有限公司专注于非侵入式神经信号传感与 AI 解析技术，是国内最早实现脑机接口技术规模化商业应用的科技企业，也是国内首家构建「脑（EEG）- 肌（EMG）- 机（ROBAT）」三位一体技术体系的脑机接口企业。

item.title: Kimi CEO：AI 研发正进入「AI 主导研究」时代，行业标准「已具备被挑战的条件」
item.guid: Kimi-CEO：AI-研发正进入「AI-主导研究」时代，行业标准「已具备被挑战的条件」
item.description:
Yesterday, Yang Zhilin, CEO of Moonshot AI, delivered a speech at the 2026 Zhongguancun Forum plenary session, titled "Open Source AI: Accelerating the Exploration of Intelligence Limits," systematically elaborating on Kimi's latest progress in large model scalability efficiency and underlying architectural innovation. 昨天，月之暗面 CEO 杨植麟在 2026 中关村论坛全体会议上发表演讲，主题为《开源 AI：加速探索智能上限》，系统阐述了 Kimi 在大模型规模化效率与底层架构创新方面的最新进展。

Yang Zhilin summarized the essence of large models as "converting more energy into intelligence," emphasizing that scalability has been the core foundation of AI development in recent years. 杨植麟将大模型的本质概括为「把更多的能源转化成智能」，强调规模化是过去数年 AI 发展的核心基础。

He pointed out that Kimi improves scalability efficiency across three dimensions: 他指出，Kimi 围绕三个维度提升规模化效率：

    TOKEN efficiency: Extracting more intelligence from the same data through superior network architecture and optimizers;

    Long context capability: Kimi's self-developed Kimi Linear architecture can achieve lower loss functions with longer contexts, supporting the completion of more complex tasks;

    Agent Swarm: By scheduling hundreds of Agents to work collaboratively in parallel, task execution time no longer increases exponentially with complexity, thereby making previously "completely impossible tasks possible".

Yang Zhilin also cited a slide from Jensen Huang's keynote speech at NVIDIA GTC 2026, pointing out that the Kimi series of open-source models is becoming a benchmark for global chip manufacturers and research institutions. "If you want to release a new chip, you must evaluate your performance improvement using Kimi or other open-source models." 杨植麟还援引英伟达 GTC 2026 黄仁勋主题演讲中的幻灯片指出，Kimi 系列开源模型正在成为全球芯片厂商和研究机构的评测基准，「如果要发布一个新的芯片，你必须要通过 Kimi 或者其他的开源模型来评测你的性能的提升」。

Regarding the judgment of R&D paradigms, Yang Zhilin outlined a clear evolutionary path: 在研发范式的判断上，杨植麟描绘了一条清晰的演进路径：

Three years ago, it was mainly based on natural internet data with a small amount of manual annotation. Last year, it shifted to large-scale reinforcement learning, and starting this year, it will enter the "AI-led research" phase – AI will autonomously synthesize tasks and training environments, design reward functions, and even explore new network architectures.

He believes that technologies considered industry standards over the past decade (such as the Adam optimizer and standard Attention architecture) are now ripe for challenge. 他认为，过去十年被视为行业标准的技术（如 Adam 优化器、标准 Attention 架构）如今均已具备被挑战的条件。

Many things previously considered standard can now be challenged.

item.title: 💡 经典科幻小说《雪崩》作者：我对头戴设备的判断是错的，二十年后人们还是会看手机
item.guid: 💡-经典科幻小说《雪崩》作者：我对头戴设备的判断是错的，二十年后人们还是会看手机
item.description:
Yesterday, Neal Stephenson, author of the classic science fiction novel "Snow Crash," published an article commenting on Meta's decision to shut down its metaverse project. 昨天，经典科幻小说《雪崩》（Snow Crash）作者 Neal Stephenson 发文，就 Meta 关闭元宇宙项目一事发表评论。

In the article, Stephenson reflected on his core beliefs during his tenure at Magic Leap, a mixed reality (MR) headset company. Stephenson 在文中回顾了自己在混合现实（MR）头戴设备公司 Magic Leap 任职期间的核心信念。

He once convinced colleagues and outsiders: "Do you really think that in twenty years, everyone will still be staring at small rectangular screens in their hands all day?" At the time, he thought the answer was obvious: no. 他曾说服同事和外界：「你真的认为二十年后，每个人还会整天盯着手里的小矩形屏幕吗？」彼时他认为答案显而易见：不会。

However, in this latest article, he directly overturned that judgment. 不过，在这篇最新的文章中，他直接推翻了这一判断。

Readers, I've changed my mind. Twenty years from now, everyone will still be staring at handheld rectangular screens – at least, that's the case if the only alternative is wearing something on your face.

Stephenson further pointed out that trying to make head-mounted devices look more and more like ordinary glasses does not solve the acceptance problem; instead, it creates a new crisis of trust. Stephenson 进一步指出，试图将头戴设备做得越来越像普通眼镜，并不能解决接受度问题，反而带来了新的信任危机。

The advent of Google Glass almost immediately spawned the term "glasshole," and Meta's smart glasses products, which resemble ordinary glasses, also encountered similar social backlash. Google Glass 问世后几乎立刻催生了「glasshole」（眼镜傻 X）一词，Meta 外形接近普通眼镜的智能眼镜产品同样遭遇了类似的社会反弹。

He believes the root cause lies in the lack of transparency: when someone is staring at their phone, bystanders can at least tell they are looking at their phone; but when facing a wearer of a head-mounted device, no one knows if the other person is looking at them, or if the camera is recording. This uncertainty makes the device inherently intrusive, "so it's unsettling." 他认为根源在于透明度的缺失：当有人盯着手机时，旁人至少能判断出他在看手机；而面对头戴设备的佩戴者，没有人知道对方是否正在注视自己，摄像头是否正在录像。这种不确定性让设备天然带有侵入感，「所以它令人不安」。

item.title: 智元酷拓发布 D1 MAX 四足机器人
item.guid: 智元酷拓发布-D1-MAX-四足机器人
item.description:
Agibot recently released its industrial-grade quadruped robot "Agibot Kuotuo D1 MAX," which is the highest-spec product in its D1 series to date. 智元机器人近日发布行业级四足机器人「智元酷拓 D1 MAX」，这是其 D1 系列迄今最高规格的产品。

Official data shows that the robot has a maximum travel speed of 8 meters/second (approximately 28.8 kilometers/hour), a range of up to 30 kilometers in extreme terrain, and a continuous working time of about 5 hours supported by a dual-battery system, more than double that of Agibot's previously launched D1 Ultra. 官方数据显示，该机器人最高行进速度达 8 米/秒（约 28.8 公里/小时），在极限地形下的续航里程可达 30 公里，双电池系统支撑下的持续工作时长约 5 小时，相比智元此前推出的 D1 Ultra 翻倍有余。

In terms of mobility, the D1 MAX has an effective payload of 30 kg, a maximum obstacle-crossing height of 80 cm, can continuously climb steps 25 cm high, and supports switching between point-foot and wheel-foot modes to adapt to different terrain scenarios. 在运动能力上，D1 MAX 有效载荷为 30 公斤，最大越障高度达 80 厘米，可连续攀爬 25 厘米高度的台阶，并支持点足与轮足两种模式切换，以适应不同地形场景。

The robot achieves IP67 protection, can operate stably in extreme temperature differences from -20°C to +55°C, supports real-time obstacle avoidance for dynamic obstacles, and adopts a modular design, allowing for the expansion of various plugins to adapt to different industry needs. 该机器人达到 IP67 防护等级，可在 -20°C 至 +55°C 的极端温差环境下稳定作业，支持对动态障碍物的实时避障，并采用模块化设计，可扩展多种插件以适配不同行业需求。

item.title: 原子重塑发布全球首款 12 喷嘴 3D 打印机
item.guid: 原子重塑发布全球首款-12-喷嘴-3D-打印机
item.description:
Yesterday, AtomForm held its "Creation Unbound" global new product launch event in Silicon Valley, officially unveiling the Palette300 smart multi-color, multi-material desktop 3D printer, which is the world's first desktop 3D printing device equipped with a 12-nozzle system. 昨天，原子重塑（AtomForm）在硅谷举办「Creation Unbound 创作无界」全球新品发布会，正式推出 Palette300 智能多色多材料桌面级 3D 打印机，这是全球首款搭载 12 喷嘴系统的桌面级 3D 打印设备。

The core breakthrough of Palette300 lies in its original OmniElement™ 12-nozzle fully automatic switching system, which integrates 12 independently heated, independently fed dedicated nozzles, completely abandoning the traditional single-nozzle switching mode to achieve "instant switching and printing," fundamentally eliminating color contamination issues. Palette300 的核心突破在于其独创的 OmniElement™ 12 喷嘴全自动切换系统，集成 12 个独立加热、独立供料的专用喷嘴，彻底摒弃传统单喷嘴切换模式，实现「秒切即打」，从根源上杜绝串色问题。

Compared to traditional solutions, this system can increase material switching speed by 50% and reduce material waste by 90%. The device is equipped with a 350°C high-temperature hot end and a 65°C actively controlled chamber, supporting 36-color expanded printing in a single run and the use of 12 material combinations. 相较传统方案，该系统可将耗材切换速度提升 50%，耗材浪费量降低 90%。设备配备 350°C 高温热端与 65°C 主动控温腔体，支持单次 36 色扩展打印及 12 种材料组合使用。

In terms of software, Atom Remodeling also simultaneously launched the slicing software AtomForm Studio and the AtomVerse creative ecosystem platform. 软件方面，原子重塑还同步推出了切片软件 AtomForm Studio 和 AtomVerse 创意生态平台。

item.title: 火山引擎创作 Agent 2.0 发布：接入 Seedance 2.0
item.guid: 火山引擎创作-Agent-2.0-发布：接入-Seedance-2.0
item.description:
Yesterday, Volcengine officially released the Creator Agent 2.0 version, fully integrating the Seedance 2.0 video generation model, and incorporating the same capabilities into the Volcengine ArkClaw official Skill library, supporting direct invocation through a "shrimp farming" dialogue method to achieve "one-click video creation" for marketing videos. 昨天，火山引擎正式发布创作 Agent 2.0 版本，全面接入 Seedance 2.0 视频生成模型，并将同款能力接入火山引擎 ArkClaw 官方 Skill 库，支持通过「养虾」对话方式直接调用，实现营销视频「一键成片」。

    Supports long video generation up to 60 seconds and multi-language voiceovers, capable of carrying more complete narrative content such as brand stories, product reviews, and plot interpretations;

    The multi-modal reference mechanism ensures stable facial features, undistorted product details, clear and readable text, and consistent visual style, significantly improving usability;

    Built-in professional lens control, supporting techniques such as horizontal/vertical shift, zoom, rotation, and Hitchcock zoom.

Currently, the platform covers mainstream social media video marketing types such as brand advertising, plot interpretation, review comparison, and daily vlogs, supporting both horizontal and vertical versions. 目前，平台已覆盖品牌广告、剧情演绎、测评对比、日常 Vlog 等主流社交媒体视频营销类型，横竖版均有支持。

According to "LatePost," Volcengine's Doubao large model has exceeded 100 trillion tokens in daily calls, growing by over 60% in less than two months. Globally, only three companies currently consume over 100 trillion tokens: OpenAI, Google, and ByteDance. 另据《晚点 LatePost》报道，火山引擎豆包大模型日均调用量已超过 100 万亿词元，不到两个月时间增长超 60%。全球目前只有三家公司的 Token 消耗量超过 100 万亿，分别是 OpenAI、Google 与字节跳动。

item.title: 腾讯元宝派推出电脑版
item.guid: 腾讯元宝派推出电脑版
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent Yuanbao officially launched the PC version of "Yuanbao Pai." 昨天，腾讯元宝正式推出「元宝派」电脑版。

In a large-screen PC environment, users can participate in screen sharing while chatting and interacting with friends or Yuanbao in a separate window. The PC version also supports multi-device message synchronization, file dragging, screenshots, and other functions, enabling information flow across devices. 在电脑端大屏环境中，用户可边参与共享屏幕，边在独立窗口与派友或元宝进行聊天互动。电脑版同步支持多端消息同步、文件拖拽、截图等功能，实现跨设备的信息流转。

This PC version also simultaneously supports "one-click creation of lobsters" and the function to associate existing lobsters. The Yuanbao Pai PC version, integrated with OpenClaw, functions as an AI-native IM, supporting in-depth research, report writing, and collaborative completion of creative tasks with other bots and Yuanbao AI within the platform. 此次电脑版还同步支持「一键创建龙虾」及关联已有龙虾的功能。接入 OpenClaw 的元宝派电脑版，以 AI 原生 IM 的形式，支持深度调研、撰写报告，以及与派内其他 Bot 和元宝 AI 协同完成创意任务。

item.title: LABUBU 撑起百亿营收，泡泡玛特交出史上最强年报
item.guid: LABUBU-撑起百亿营收，泡泡玛特交出史上最强年报
item.description:
Yesterday, Pop Mart International Group released its full-year financial report for 2025. 昨天，泡泡玛特国际集团发布 2025 年全年财报。

    In 2025, Pop Mart achieved revenue of 37.12 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 184.7%, falling short of market estimates of 37.96 billion RMB;

    Adjusted net profit was 13.08 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 284.5%;

    Net profit was 12.78 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 308.8%, exceeding market estimates of 12.64 billion RMB.

Regarding IP: IP 方面：

    The THE MONSTERS series, which includes LABUBU, achieved revenue of 14.16 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 365.7%, with its share of total revenue rising to 38.1%, breaking the 10 billion mark for the first time;

    6 major IPs including SKULLPANDA, CRYBABY, MOLLY, DIMOO, and Xingxingren (Starman) exceeded 2 billion RMB in revenue, and 17 IPs exceeded 100 million RMB in revenue.

In terms of regional markets, the Chinese market achieved full-year revenue of 20.85 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 134.6%, with a net increase of 14 offline stores, bringing the total number of stores to 445; the Asia-Pacific market achieved revenue of 8.01 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 157.6%. 地区市场方面，中国市场全年营收 208.5 亿元，同比增长 134.6%，净增 14 家线下门店，门店总数达 445 家；亚太市场实现营收 80.1 亿元，同比增长 157.6%。

item.title: 拓竹 x 《无畏契约》发起 3D 打印模型设计大赛
item.guid: 拓竹-x-《无畏契约》发起-3D-打印模型设计大赛
item.description:
Yesterday, Bambu Lab and "Valorant" jointly announced a themed crossover event, aiming to inspire creative collaboration between the player community and 3D printing makers. 昨天，拓竹与《无畏契约》联合官宣，发起主题跨界活动，旨在激发玩家社区与 3D 打印创客的创意联动。

The core of this event includes two parallel competitions: "MakerWorld x Valorant Themed Model Design Master Competition" and the social media "#BambuLabValorant UGC Incentive Program." 本次活动核心包含两项并行赛事：「MakerWorld x 《无畏契约》主题模型设计大师赛」与社媒「#上拓竹打瓦# UGC激励计划」。

The Design Master Competition is divided into two tracks: "Valuable Creative Realization" and "Rave Party Gear." It encourages participants to transform in-game characters, equipment, props, and other elements into printable 3D models, or to design trendy wearable accessories. 设计大师赛分为「瓦的创意实体化」和「Rave 派对装备」两个赛道，鼓励参赛者将游戏内的角色、装备、道具等元素转化为可打印的 3D 模型，或设计具有潮流感的可穿戴配饰。

Winners will have the opportunity to receive rewards such as the Bambu Lab H2C multi-color kit, and outstanding works will be officially displayed at the Valorant V-TOUR Hangzhou stop. 获奖者将有机会获得拓竹 H2C 多色套装等奖励，优秀作品还将在《无畏契约》V-TOUR 无畏巡回杭州站进行官方展示。

item.title: 「中园石化」加油站被查
item.guid: 「中园石化」加油站被查
item.description:
According to CCTV News, a gas station named "Zhongyuan Petrochemical" in Luquan District, Shijiazhuang, Hebei, has recently attracted widespread attention. 据央视新闻报道，河北石家庄鹿泉区一家名为「中园石化」的加油站近日引发广泛关注。

The gas station's sign features a red background with white lettering. Its Chinese name differs from "Sinopec" by only one character, and its English logo "SNOPEC" also differs from Sinopec's "SINOPEC" by just one letter "I." The overall appearance, decoration, color scheme, and font style are highly similar to Sinopec. 该加油站招牌采用红底白字设计，中文名称与「中国石化」仅一字之差，英文标识「SNOPEC」也与中国石化「SINOPEC」相差仅一个字母「I」，整体外观装潢、配色及字体风格与中国石化高度相似。

The incident began when a Hebei netizen posted that after refueling, they realized the gas station was not Sinopec, stating, "I was careless, it's too much like Sinopec." The post subsequently sparked heated discussion, and related topics trended on hot searches. 事件起因于一名河北网友发帖称，加完油才发现所在加油站并非中国石化，「大意了，这也太像中石化了」。该帖随后引发热议，相关话题话题登上热搜。

The Luquan District Market Supervision Administration subsequently intervened and investigated. After verification, it was determined that the gas station had unauthorizedly used storefront decorations similar to "Sinopec." It has been ordered to remove the relevant signs, and a formal investigation has been launched. 鹿泉区市场监督管理局随后介入调查，经核查认定该加油站擅自使用了与「中国石化」近似的门头装潢，已责令其拆除相关标识，并正式立案调查。

item.title: 《双城记》首曝剧照
item.guid: 《双城记》首曝剧照
item.description:
Official stills for "A Tale of Two Cities," a BBC and MGM+ co-production adapting Dickens' classic novel, were released yesterday. BBC 与 MGM+ 联合打造的狄更斯名著改编剧集《双城记》昨日首曝官方剧照。

The series consists of four episodes, directed by Xu Taifeng, with Daniel West serving as creator and screenwriter. The story is set in 1782, spanning the cities of London and Paris. 该剧共四集，由许泰丰执导，丹尼尔·韦斯特担任主创及编剧。剧情设定于 1782 年，横跨伦敦与巴黎两座城市。

The story revolves around the protagonist Lucie Manette (played by Mac) – she learns that her father, believed to have died 20 years ago, is actually still alive. The French immigrant Charles Darnay (played by Seville), who brings this news, is immediately arrested for treason. 故事围绕女主角 Lucie Manette（麦克饰）展开——她得知被认为已死去 20 年的父亲其实仍在人世，带来这一消息的法国移民 Charles Darnay（西维尔饰）随即以叛国罪被捕。

Lucie seeks help from the brilliant but eccentric young lawyer Sydney Carton (played by Harrington), which sparks a complex love triangle. Lucie 求助于才华横溢却性格乖僻的年轻律师 Sydney Carton（哈灵顿饰），由此引发一段复杂的三角关系。

item.title: 曝迪士尼将拍「灰姑娘」衍生电影
item.guid: 曝迪士尼将拍「灰姑娘」衍生电影
item.description:
According to Deadline, Disney is developing a live-action film "Stepsisters," reportedly a spin-off of the classic animated film "Cinderella," focusing on Cinderella's two "wicked stepsisters," Anastasia and Drizella. 据《Deadline》报道，迪士尼将开发真人电影《Stepsisters》（继姐），该片据悉为经典动画《灰姑娘》的衍生作品，故事聚焦于灰姑娘的两位「恶毒继姐」Anastasia 与 Drizella。

Akiva Schaffer will direct, while Dan Gregor and Doug Mand will serve as screenwriters. They will rewrite the original script by Michael Montemayor (writer of "Tangled"). 导演一职由阿基瓦·沙弗尔（Akiva Schaffer）出任，编剧则由丹·格雷戈尔（Dan Gregor）与道格·曼德（Doug Mand）担纲，二人将在 Michael Montemayor（《魔发奇缘》编剧）的原始剧本基础上进行改写。

Regarding production, Ali Bell will serve as producer on behalf of Party Over Here, Jessica Virtue, Executive Vice President of Disney's Live-Action Film Division, will oversee the project, with Creative Executive Cady Stark also involved. 制片方面，阿里·贝尔（Ali Bell）将代表 Party Over Here 担任制片人，迪士尼真人电影部门执行副总裁杰西卡·维尔图（Jessica Virtue）将监督该项目，创意执行 Cady Stark 协同参与。

item.title: 《森中有林》定档五一
item.guid: 《森中有林》定档五一
item.description:
"Forest Within a Forest" released its official trailer and poster yesterday, announcing its nationwide release on May 1st. 《森中有林》昨日发布定档预告与定档海报，官宣将于 5 月 1 日全国上映。

The film tells the story of a family's destiny spanning forty years. The narrative revolves around an unsolved case, two families, and forty years, intertwining love and hate, and presenting a journey of gratitude and revenge across three generations. 影片讲述一个家庭跨越四十年的命运变迁。故事围绕一桩悬案、两组家庭与四十年光阴，交织爱恨纠葛，呈现三代人之间的报恩与复仇历程。
